long_form.title: The Evolving Geography of Terror: Global Attack Targets 1970-2022
long_form.description: Explore the comprehensive evolution of global terrorism targets from 1970 to 2022. This video visualizes how the focus of terrorist attacks dramatically shifted across regions and over decades, revealing changing vulnerabilities, tactics, and geopolitical landscapes. Understand the long-term trends and surprising transformations in global security. Data source: Our World in Data.

short.title: North America Went From #100 to #1 in Terror Targets (1976-1995) #Shorts
short.description: Witness the astonishing shift in global terrorism targets between 1976 and 1995, as North America skyrocketed from #100 to #1. This 60-second short highlights the dramatic period when countries like the Central African Republic, Swaziland, and Seychelles also unexpectedly entered the top 10 most targeted regions.
